sentences.text: Thank you for calling Ashcroft investment company. If you know your party's extension you may dial it at any time. Please note that in light of recent declarations from state and local government. In regards to COVID-19 our office will be closed to visitors until further notice please be assured that ashcraft staff will be available via phone and email and our office will remain fully operational during this time for maintenance emergencies after hours or on weekends press five now for immediate assistance dial extension one hundred now please listen carefully for the name and extension number of the person you would like to reach for Jim ashcraft, dial extension one, zero. One Alice ashcraft at the dial one zero, two can cause Bert one zero three Sarah Quincy dial one zero for Lisa Cooper dial one, zero, five Jackie cruise dial one zero six. Hi, you've reached Sarah Quincy with ashcraft investment company. If this is an emergency please call seven six zero six nine six zero six two nine, otherwise. Please leave a voicemail and I'll call you back as soon as possible. Have a great day.
